note: seq=88: standalone WATCHER to restore live monitoring (replaces the truncated meta_guardian.py which no-ops with no __main__). Small/complete/self-contained: pg_isready+conns, systemctl is-active on key units, failed atlas/brain units (conservative restart of FAILED non-lifeline atlas-* only, never autopull/guardian/ssh), enrich_queue runaway, publishes status/hetzner/guardian-latest.json every 75s. VERIFIED COMPLETE before deploy (has __main__, ends clean with raise SystemExit(main()), compiles, REAL --selftest PASS 7/7, --once produces output) -- applying the mount-truncation lesson. Retires the no-op atlas-guardian.timer. Selftest-gated on the box too.

steps.note: seq=88: standalone watcher @75s publishing guardian-latest.json; retires the truncated no-op guardian.

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import hashlib,sys; w={'/opt/atlas/importers/atlas_watcher.py':'2fa95b462a19c18e33c40e2f83a3a09bbcaa97625085ce4f5a499440ade91a44'}; [sys.exit('SHA MISMATCH '+p) for p,h in w.items() if hashlib.sha256(open(p,'rb').read()).hexdigest()!=h]; print('watcher sha ok')"

steps.content:
[Unit]
Description=ATLAS standalone watcher (pg + units + freshness + queue; publishes guardian-latest.json)
After=network-online.target postgresql.service
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=oneshot
Nice=5
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/db.env
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/autopull.env
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/audit.env
ExecStart=/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python /opt/atlas/importers/atlas_watcher.py
TimeoutStartSec=60

[Unit]
Description=ATLAS watcher timer (75s)

[Timer]
OnBootSec=15s
OnUnitActiveSec=75s
AccuracySec=5s
Unit=atlas-watcher.service

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import os,subprocess as s; keys=['STATUS_TOKEN','STATUS_REPO','STATUS_API_BASE','STATUS_BRANCH','NODE_ID']; open('/etc/atlas/audit.env','w').write(chr(10).join('%s=%s'%(k,os.environ[k]) for k in keys if os.environ.get(k))+chr(10)); os.chmod('/etc/atlas/audit.env',0o600); s.run(['systemctl','daemon-reload']); s.run(['systemctl','stop','atlas-guardian.timer']); s.run(['systemctl','disable','atlas-guardian.timer']); s.run(['systemctl','enable','atlas-watcher.timer']); s.run(['systemctl','start','atlas-watcher.timer']); s.run(['systemctl','reset-failed','atlas-watcher.service']); s.run(['systemctl','start','atlas-watcher.service']); print('watcher live; no-op guardian retired')"
